# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  BUILD_SCRIPT: "scripts/build.sh"
  TEST_SCRIPT: "scripts/test.sh"
  DEPLOY_SCRIPT: "scripts/deploy.sh"
  CUSTOM_IMAGE: "ubuntu:latest"
  BUILD_ARGS: ""
  TEST_ARGS: ""
  DEPLOY_ARGS: ""
  PRE_BUILD_SCRIPT: ""
  POST_BUILD_SCRIPT: ""
  ENABLE_TEST: "true"
  ENABLE_DEPLOY: "false"
  ARTIFACT_PATH: "build/"

default:
  image: $CUSTOM_IMAGE
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - echo "Running pipeline for project $CI_PROJECT_NAME on branch $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME"
    - echo "Commit SHA - $CI_COMMIT_SHA"
    - |
      if [ -f "scripts/setup.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running setup script..."
        chmod +x scripts/setup.sh
        ./scripts/setup.sh
      fi
    - |
      if [ -n "$PRE_BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Running pre-build script..."
        eval "$PRE_BUILD_SCRIPT"
      fi

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom build script: $BUILD_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$BUILD_SCRIPT"
        ./"$BUILD_SCRIPT" $BUILD_ARGS
      elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
        echo "Makefile detected, running make..."
        make build
      elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
        echo "package.json detected, running npm build..."
        npm install
        npm run build
      elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
        echo "pom.xml detected, running Maven build..."
        mvn clean package -B
      elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
        echo "Gradle build file detected, running Gradle build..."
        ./gradlew build
      elif [ -f "requirements.txt" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
        echo "Python project detected, running Python build..."
        pip install -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || true
        python setup.py build 2>/dev/null || true
      elif [ -f "Cargo.toml" ]; then
        echo "Rust project detected, running cargo build..."
        cargo build --release
      elif [ -f "go.mod" ]; then
        echo "Go project detected, running go build..."
        go build ./...
      else
        echo "No recognized build system found. Please provide a custom build script at $BUILD_SCRIPT"
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      if [ -n "$POST_BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Running post-build script..."
        eval "$POST_BUILD_SCRIPT"
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - $ARTIFACT_PATH
    expire_in: 1 week
    when: on_success
  cache:
    key: "${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-build"
    paths:
      - node_modules/
      - .m2/repository/
      - .gradle/
      - __pycache__/
      - target/
      - vendor/
  rules:
    - exists:
        - $BUILD_SCRIPT
    - exists:
        - Makefile
    - exists:
        - package.json
    - exists:
        - pom.xml
    - exists:
        - build.gradle
    - exists:
        - build.gradle.kts
    - exists:
        - requirements.txt
    - exists:
        - setup.py
    - exists:
        - pyproject.toml
    - exists:
        - Cargo.toml
    - exists:
        - go.mod
    - when: always

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ "$ENABLE_TEST" != "true" ]; then
        echo "Testing is disabled. Set ENABLE_TEST=true to enable."
        exit 0
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f "$TEST_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom test script: $TEST_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$TEST_SCRIPT"
        ./"$TEST_SCRIPT" $TEST_ARGS
      elif [ -f "Makefile" ] && grep -q "^test:" Makefile; then
        echo "Running make test..."
        make test
      elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
        echo "Running npm test..."
        npm install
        npm test
      elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
        echo "Running Maven tests..."
        mvn test -B
      elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
        echo "Running Gradle tests..."
        ./gradlew test
      elif [ -f "requirements.txt" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
        echo "Running Python tests..."
        pip install -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || true
        pip install pytest 2>/dev/null || true
        pytest --junitxml=report.xml || python -m unittest discover
      elif [ -f "Cargo.toml" ]; then
        echo "Running Rust tests..."
        cargo test
      elif [ -f "go.mod" ]; then
        echo "Running Go tests..."
        go test ./...
      else
        echo "No recognized test framework found. Please provide a custom test script at $TEST_SCRIPT"
        echo "Skipping tests."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - $ARTIFACT_PATH
      - report.xml
      - "**/*.xml"
    reports:
      junit:
        - report.xml
        - "**/TEST-*.xml"
        - "**/surefire-reports/*.xml"
    expire_in: 1 week
    when: always
  cache:
    key: "${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-test"
    paths:
      - node_modules/
      - .m2/repository/
      - .gradle/
      - __pycache__/
      - target/
      - vendor/
  dependencies:
    - build
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_TEST == "true"'
      when: on_success
    - when: never

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ "$ENABLE_DEPLOY" != "true" ]; then
        echo "Deployment is disabled. Set ENABLE_DEPLOY=true to enable."
        exit 0
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom deploy script: $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        ./"$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" $DEPLOY_ARGS
      elif [ -f "Makefile" ] && grep -q "^deploy:" Makefile; then
        echo "Running make deploy..."
        make deploy
      else
        echo "No deploy script found at $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        echo "Please create a deploy script or set DEPLOY_SCRIPT variable."
        exit 1
      fi
  dependencies:
    - build
    - test
  environment:
    name: $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG
    url: ${DEPLOY_URL:-https://$CI_PROJECT_NAME.example.com}
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_TAG'
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false
    - when: never

custom_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "scripts/custom.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom job script..."
        chmod +x scripts/custom.sh
        ./scripts/custom.sh
      else
        echo "No custom script found at scripts/custom.sh. Skipping."
      fi
  rules:
    - exists:
        - scripts/custom.sh
      when: on_success
    - when: never
  allow_failure: true
